title: Add a Dark Mode Toggle
description: Implement a dark mode toggle that switches the page's color scheme using CSS custom properties and a class on the body element.
requirements: Add a toggle button in the header
Define a [data-theme='dark'] set of custom properties
Toggle the data-theme attribute via JavaScript
hints: Use CSS custom properties in :root and [data-theme='dark']
Add transition: background-color 0.3s, color 0.3s to the body
solution: Create a toggle button. On click, toggle document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme'). Define dark custom properties. Add smooth transitions.

title: Implement Scroll-Triggered Animations
description: Add fade-in animations to sections as they scroll into view using the Intersection Observer API.
requirements: Sections start with opacity: 0 and transform: translateY(30px)
Use IntersectionObserver to add a 'visible' class
Stagger animation delays for child elements
Ensure elements are still accessible when hidden
hints: Use CSS transition or animation on the class change
Set observer rootMargin to trigger earlier
solution: Observe each section with IntersectionObserver. On intersection, add 'visible' class. CSS: .visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); transition: 0.6s ease; }

title: Build a Multi-Step Signup Form in the CTA Section
description: Replace the CTA section with a multi-step signup form that validates fields and shows progress indicators.
requirements: ARIA live regions for dynamic content changes
Responsive layout matching the landing page theme
hints: Use display: none/block to show/hide steps
Track current step in JavaScript variable
solution: Structure each step as a div. Track step index. Validate each step before advancing. Show progress via width percentage on a progress bar. Use CSS transitions for step changes.
